title: Internal error when using array query function on list of objects inside begin...end block within function

features.name: array query find with with expression on class object array
features.description: Code should include an array query method find() with a with expression operating on an array of class objects

features.name: begin end block in non-automatic function with array query
features.description: Code should include a begin...end block inside a non-automatic function that contains an array query with with expression
